pubmed_links: [Mizukoshi et al. (2020) SCAI splice variants localization and roles in neuronal cells](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32736682/);[Ihara et al. (2024) BDNF downregulates SCAI mRNA in cortical neurons](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38009531/)
summary: SCAI (suppressor of cancer cell invasion) encodes a transcriptional repressor of SRF/MRTF-mediated gene expression whose neuronal splice variants differentially regulate neuronal morphology and dendritic complexity during brain development. BDNF downregulates SCAI mRNA via the ERK/MAPK pathway in cortical neurons, linking SCAI to neurotrophic signaling pathways implicated in neuropsychiatric disorders. (novel candidate)
